title: CBSE worksheet layout extraction
description: VisionInterface responseSchema for a single photographed CBSE-style worksheet page. Nullable fields mean illegible/unknown — never invent grades or marks. Single page only (pageIndex must be 0).

board.description: Exam board when readable (e.g. CBSE); null when unknown.

classLevel.description: Class/grade band when readable (e.g. Class 8); null when unknown.

subject.description: Subject label when readable; null when unknown.

title.description: Worksheet title when readable; null when unknown.

pageIndex.description: Caller passes one page image; multi-image batches are rejected by the document path.

confidence.description: Overall extraction confidence (field-level confidences live on items).

items.description: Bounded question/response rows; empty when nothing readable.

learnerResponse.description: Learner answer text; null when blank or illegible.

marksAllocated.description: Printed marks for the item; null when absent/illegible — never invent.

marksAwarded.description: Awarded marks when marked on the page; null when unmarked/illegible — never invent grades.

partial.description: true when extraction is incomplete (low resolution, crop, or unresolved fields).

unresolvedFields.description: Dotted paths for fields left unknown without hallucination.
